scenes.text: Welcome to the world of Docker, where we streamline the process of deploying and managing applications in containers. Unlike traditional VM (Virtual Machine) approaches that require significant resources, Docker provides a lightweight and portable solution, enabling developers to package applications and dependencies cyclically. Imagine running your application comfortably in a consistent environment across different machines, from development to production, making collaborations and deployments efficient. In this introductory scene, we'll get a high-level overview of Docker's core concepts including Docker Image, Docker Container, and the Docker Engine.
scenes.image_prompt: graph TD; Docker[Docker] -->|runs on| Host[Host OS]; Docker -->|uses| Engine[Docker Engine]; Engine --> Image[Docker Image]; Engine --> Container[Docker Container]; Image --> Container;
